untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option Greeks (gamma, vega) and multi-leg option spread construction (ratio calculation between two strikes). These derivatives require option chain data and volatility surface analysis not available in the standard price/technical indicator set. The gamma-neutral ratio determination and specific call spread legs (April 50 calls vs April 60 calls) cannot be expressed using only price/volume/technical indicators.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation: Entry condition based on 'historical volatility much lower than expected' mapped to hvol_20 < 0.15 (low volatility regime). Exit reversal condition when volatility rises significantly (hvol_20 > 0.25). However, the core logic of constructing a gamma-neutral spread with specific strike ratios and vega targeting requires option-specific Greeks unavailable in this indicator set. A proper implementation would need an options module with gamma, vega, and theta calculations.
